company.tagline_short: Performance marketing partner untuk UMKM & mid-market Indonesia
company.tagline_long: Senior performance marketing partner managing Meta, Google, TikTok & YouTube campaigns for Indonesian businesses since 2016
company.description_50: Performance marketing agency untuk UMKM & bisnis menengah Indonesia. Spesialis Meta Ads, Google Ads, TikTok Ads.
company.description_100: Beriklan.co.id adalah agency performance marketing senior berbasis di Bandung, mengelola campaign Meta, Google, TikTok, dan YouTube untuk UMKM dan bisnis menengah Indonesia sejak 2016.
company.description_200: Beriklan.co.id adalah agency performance marketing senior berbasis di Bandung, mengelola campaign iklan Meta (Facebook + Instagram), Google (Search + Display + YouTube + PMax), TikTok Ads, dan YouTube Ads untuk UMKM dan bisnis menengah Indonesia sejak 2016. Layanan mencakup strategi, targeting, creative production, A/B testing, dan optimasi ROAS mingguan dengan laporan transparan dan akses penuh ke akun klien.
company.description_300: Beriklan.co.id adalah agency performance marketing senior berbasis di Bandung, mengelola campaign iklan Meta (Facebook + Instagram), Google (Search + Display + YouTube + PMax), TikTok Ads, dan YouTube Ads untuk UMKM dan bisnis menengah Indonesia sejak 2016. Pendiri tim memiliki sertifikasi Meta Business Partner dan Google Ads. Layanan mencakup konsultasi strategi, audience research, campaign setup, creative production (static + video), A/B testing, weekly ROAS optimization, dan reporting transparan. Setiap klien mendapat akses penuh ke akun iklan mereka — kein black box. Klien aktif dari eCommerce (fashion, beauty, F&B, electronics), SaaS, education, professional services, dan real estate.

contact.address_full: Jl. Arcamanik Endah No.76, Arcamanik, Bandung 40195, Jawa Barat, Indonesia

social_proof.client_testimonials_placeholder: Available on request — multiple 5-star reviews from eCommerce, SaaS, F&B clients in Indonesia

submission_template_short: Hi, I'd like to list Beriklan — a performance marketing agency based in Bandung, Indonesia. We've been managing Meta/Google/TikTok ad campaigns since 2016 for Indonesian UMKM and mid-market businesses. Let me know what info you need.
submission_template_long: Hi team, I'd like to submit Beriklan (https://beriklan.co.id) — a performance marketing agency specializing in Meta Ads, Google Ads, and TikTok Ads for the Indonesian market. Founded in 2016, we manage 500+ campaigns annually with $2M+ in ad spend. Services: PPC (60%), Social Media (20%), SEO (15%), Content (5%). Industries: eCommerce, F&B, SaaS, Education, Real Estate. Team size: 8, with Meta Business Partner + Google Ads certifications. Based in Bandung, Indonesia. Please let me know what additional info you need. — Tim Beriklan, admin@beriklan.co.id
